name: StructuresFieldAttribute
summary: The StructuresFieldAttribute class is used for mapping a database attribute to a data field that the plug-in uses in execution. The attribute is initialized from the custom attribute [StructuresField(attributeName)] in the plug-in source. In the plug-in the data field must be public and the type must be double, integer or string.

constructors.name: StructuresFieldAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [StructuresField(attributeName)] uses this to map a database attribute to a data field that the plug-in uses in execution. This is not to be used by itself.
